mapper.select: SELECT e.EMP_ID empId, e.EMP_NAME empName, e.EMP_PW empPw, e.EMP_TEL empTel, e.EMP_EMAIL empEmail, e.EMP_DEPTNO empDeptno, d.DNAME empDname, e.EMP_AUTH empAuth, a.AUTH_NAME empAuthName, e.EMP_FIRST empFirst, e.EMP_INOFFICE empInOffice, e.EMP_HIREDATE empHiredate FROM EMP e LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPT d ON e.EMP_DEPTNO = d.DEPTNO LEFT OUTER JOIN AUTH a ON e.EMP_AUTH = a.AUTH_NO WHERE upper(e.EMP_ID) = upper(#{empId}) and e.EMP_AUTH != 0 and e.EMP_INOFFICE != 0
